title: Mission Outcomes
query: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MissionCompleted WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) AS count, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MissionFailed WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) AS failed, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM MissionAbandoned WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate) AS abandoned

details.text: {count} contract(s) completed, {failed} failed before the deadline or target was lost, and {abandoned} abandoned mid-flight during the report period. Failed and abandoned missions incur a reputation penalty with the issuing minor faction, which can affect future mission availability and payouts.
details.help: count = completions (drives title as the most positive headline metric). failed and abandoned are supporting detail.

tagLines: Mission outcome statistics compiled. Contractors with high failure rates are advised to review contract selection criteria.
Mostly completed. Mostly. The failures have been noted.
Completions, failures, and the quiet shameful ones you abandoned and hope no one asks about.
